name: Loan for Any Purpose
description_short: Milwaukee's Loan for Any Purpose at 1042 N Doctor M.L.K. Jr Dr, Suite D — personal loans with flexible terms for Wisconsin residents.
description_long:
Loan for Any Purpose operates a personal loan office at 1042 N Doctor M.L.K. Jr Dr, Suite D in Milwaukee, WI. This standalone Milwaukee location is open Monday through Friday from 7 AM to 8 PM, with weekend hours (Saturday and Sunday) from 9 AM to 6 PM. The branch serves Milwaukee residents seeking in-person loan consultations.

The team at this location specializes in personal loans for various purposes. Contact the Milwaukee office at +1 414-295-0336 to speak with a loan officer about your financial needs, eligibility, and available terms. Loan officers can discuss loan amounts, rates, and repayment schedules tailored to your situation.

When visiting Loan for Any Purpose in Milwaukee, bring a valid government-issued photo ID and proof of income or recent tax returns. Visit during afternoon hours on weekdays to minimize wait times, or call ahead to schedule an appointment. The personal service at this WI location focuses on understanding each customer's unique financial goals.
address: 1042 N Doctor M.L.K. Jr Dr suite d, Milwaukee, WI 53203

company_info.headquarters: 1042 N Doctor M.L.K. Jr Dr suite d, Milwaukee, WI 53203

pros: Wide loan range from $250 to $50,000 accommodates both small emergency needs and larger borrowing
All credit types accepted on most products — explicitly includes bad credit borrowers
Application does not affect FICO score; uses non-traditional consumer reporting agency
Extended hours including weekends (7am–8pm weekdays, 9am–6pm weekends) for working borrowers
Physical branch locations in Detroit and Atlanta for in-person service
Same-day loans available with fast approval and minimum documentation required
Title loans allow borrowers to access up to $50,000 using vehicle equity without selling the car
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed anywhere on the website
Product mix includes payday loans and title loans — product types commonly associated with high-cost borrowing
Approved amounts may be significantly lower than advertised maximums; qualification not guaranteed
Only two known physical locations (Detroit and Atlanta); availability in other states unclear
Personal loans up to $50,000 require a higher credit score, limiting access for the bad-credit borrowers most of their marketing targets
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers who need same-day or next-day cash with bad or thin credit
Vehicle owners in Michigan or Georgia who want to leverage their car title for a larger loan amount
Borrowers who prefer in-person branch visits over fully online lending
Working-class borrowers who need access outside standard 9-to-5 banking hours
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose suits Detroit or Atlanta borrowers who need quick access to funds across a wide range — from a few hundred dollars to $50,000 — and have credit that banks won't approve. The main caveat is that APRs and fees are not disclosed upfront, so borrowers should request full cost details before signing, especially on title loans and payday products which typically carry the highest rates in any lender's portfolio.
services: Title loans (up to $50,000, secured by vehicle)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, higher credit recommended)
In-person branch lending at Detroit and Atlanta locations
Non-traditional credit review (alternative to hard pull)
meta_description: Loan for Any Purpose at 1042 N Doctor M.L.K. Jr Dr, Milwaukee, WI. Personal loans with quick approvals and flexible terms for local borrowers.
